creator: cmt@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 194816
thunderbird 52.9.0 candidate2

while we wait for thunderbird 60, there's a 52.9.0 materializing:
http://ftp.mozilla.org/pub/thunderbird/candidates/52.9.0-candidates/build2/

Update is completely straight-forward, and I couldn't find any changed dependencies over 52.8.0. Passes poudriere and seems to work for me.

Between "web browser-alike" and Security cd81806c-26e7-4d4a-8425-02724a2f48af this will me MFH'ed.
